notes: All three requirement atoms are fully implemented and tested. REQ-0001: naming_conventions_test.dart enforces adjective-style boolean names (no is/has prefixes) via regex scans across all lib/src files with 2 dedicated test cases. REQ-0002: lib/obers_ui.dart is a complete barrel export file (304 lines) organizing all components across Foundation, Primitives, Components, Composites, Modules, Models, Utils and Tools categories. REQ-0003: OiThemeData provides light/dark/fromBrand factories; OiDynamicTheme wraps brand-color generation with fromColor/fromColorPair/fromSeedColor; OiPlayground provides a storybook-like component browser — all fully tested in oi_dynamic_theme_test.dart (133 lines, 12 test cases).
